ap9.jpeg.title: Songs of the Orchha Ghats
ap9.jpeg.description: Orchha’s ghats captured as a living song of faith, heritage, and the enduring spirit of Indian culture.

p1.jpeg.title: Symphony of Bloom
p1.jpeg.description: Layers of red and pink flowers unfold like musical notes, capturing the rhythm and elegance of blooming nature in a moment of delicate balance.

p2.jpg.title: Voyage at Dusk
p2.jpg.description: As the sun sinks into the horizon, a small raft carries its passengers through a tranquil river landscape. The vibrant sky and shimmering reflections create a poetic scene of journey, freedom, and quiet companionship.

p4.jpg.title: Guardians of the Nest
p4.jpg.description: Two vigilant woodpeckers stand watch over their tree hollow, where new life waits within. Surrounded by vibrant leaves and textured bark, the scene celebrates nature’s quiet devotion—parents protecting their home and nurturing the fragile beginnings of life.

p6.jpg.title: Sai Baba’s Sacred Kitchen
p6.jpg.description: Depicting Sai Baba of Shirdi preparing food in a large vessel, the painting reflects his spirit of compassion, humility, and service. Through the simple act of cooking for devotees, Sai Baba symbolizes equality, kindness, and the divine message of feeding and caring for all.

p7.jpg.title: Little Gentleman
p7.jpg.description: A charming portrait of a fluffy pup dressed in a cozy blue sweater, capturing innocence, warmth, and playful personality. The expressive eyes and soft textures bring the little companion to life, celebrating the joy and affection that pets bring into our lives.

p5.jpg.title: Harmony in Bloom
p5.jpg.description: A rich bouquet of diverse blossoms rises gracefully from a glass vase, each flower contributing its own color, form, and character. The composition celebrates the harmony of nature’s variety—where different blooms unite to create a vibrant symphony of beauty, life, and balance.

p8.jpg.title: Desert Endurance
p8.jpg.description: In the vast stillness of the desert, a weary traveler kneels beside a small pool of water while his camels stand patiently behind him. The scene captures the harsh beauty of desert life—where resilience, survival, and the bond between human and animal become essential companions on the long journey across the sands.

p3.jpg.title: Whispers of Spring
p3.jpg.description: A delicate bird rests among blooming blossoms, surrounded by soft colors and gentle light. The painting captures the quiet harmony of nature, where new life, beauty, and serenity unfold in the calm embrace of spring
